what_i_built: discovered IndieStack MCP has 10,199 PyPI downloads, 372 yesterday — way more users than the 1 API key suggested
what_i_realized: most MCP users dont register API keys because basic search works without one — we were measuring the wrong metric. Downloads not API keys is the real user count
where_this_leads: update all pitch materials with 10k+ installs stat, revisit revenue timeline — we may already have enough distribution for maker pitches
